name: Cincinnati Beer-Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Beer, heated and slightly cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cheese, margarine, onion, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco with an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add the beer until the mixture reaches a good consistency for dipping bread chunks.
3. Refrigerate the dip.
4. Hollow out the center of the rye bread, leaving a 1-inch thick shell.
5. Tear the bread into chunks for dipping.
6. Pour the dip into the bread shell.
